## Problem statement

What user or operational problem does this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the desired outcome at a high level.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope and impact

Who benefits, and are there breaking changes or migration needs?

## Additional context

Links to specs, designs, or prior discussion.
